name: Melandryidae
diagnosis: The Melandryidae or false darkling beetles are a family of beetles in the large suborder Polyphaga.

genus_notes.dircaea: Dircaea is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Melandryidae.
genus_notes.melandrya: Melandrya is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Melandryidae.
genus_notes.osphya: Osphya is a genus of false darkling beetles in the family Melandryidae.
